items.line_en: Hi Tyler, how's the internship coming along?

coach.say: Hi Tyler, how's the internship coming along?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hi Tyler, / how's the internship coming along?

items.line_en: I was promised interesting work, but all I'm doing is boring spreadsheets.

coach.say: I was promised interesting work, but all I'm doing is boring spreadsheets.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I was promised interesting work, / but all I'm doing is boring spreadsheets.
Chunk it: I can't take it anymore.

items.line_en: But this is only your second day on the job.

coach.say: But this is only your second day on the job.
coach.hint: Chunk it: But this is only your second day on the job.

items.line_en: I'm sure things will get better.

coach.say: I'm sure things will get better.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I'm sure things will get better.

items.line_en: Okay, I'll try to stick it out.

coach.say: Okay, I'll try to stick it out.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Okay, / I'll try to stick it out.

items.line_en: I don't want to be a critter.

coach.say: I don't want to be a critter.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I don't want to be a critter.
